docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,845.23 FILED BY AGRAWAL, NAMRATA BATRA AS TO DEFENDANT AEROVIAS DEL CONTINENTE AMERICANO S.A. AVIANVA AVIANCA AIRLINES S.A.  AKA AEROVIAS DEL CONTINENTE AMERICANO S.A. AVIANVA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER PLAINTIFFS REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2026 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON 2/13/26 CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO AVIANCA AIRLINES VIA MAIL. (ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2026 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-20-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. **CASES CSM-25-870813, CSM-25-870 & CSM-25-870816 ARE TO BE HEARD TOGETHER.** PLAINTIFF NAMRATA BATRA AGRAWAL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AVIANCA AIRLINES IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY AGRAWAL, NAMRATA BATRA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGRAWAL, NAMRATA BATRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AEROVIAS DEL CONTINENTE AMERICANO S.A. AVIANVA AVIANCA AIRLINES S.A.  AKA AEROVIAS DEL CONTINENTE AMERICANO S.A. AVIANVA $2,182.88 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,357.88, REPLACEMENT TICKETS, TRANSPORTATION, HOTEL, AND BREAKFAST WERE REASONABLY RELATED TO DEFENDANT'S ACTIONS. DEFENDANT NAME CORRECTED NUNC PRO TUNC TO REFLECT PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-10-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $100.00 AS TO DEFENDANT AEROVIAS DEL CONTINENTE AMERICANO S.A. AVIANVA AVIANCA AIRLINES S.A.  AKA AEROVIAS DEL CONTINENTE AMERICANO S.A. AVIANVA
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY AGRAWAL, NAMRATA BATRA
REMARK: RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON 3/13/26 SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DF VIA COURT CERTIFIED MAIL. (ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-20-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-20-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJUEETH. PLAINTIFF NAMRATA BATRA AGRAWAL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AVIANCA AIRLINES IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. THE COURT CORRECTS THE NAME OF THE DEFENDANT TO AEROVIAS DEL CONTINENTE AMERICANO S.A. AVIANVA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: LAUREN KRAMER SUJUEETH; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
